sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n14449" key="a)propeti/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπρο-πετία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n14449.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">freedom from precipitancy,</tr_> Ti. <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dialect" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Locr.</gram> </gramGrp> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:102e" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">102e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
